channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dunmore Rd opposite No 1, 26th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunmore Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Street light not working, 26th March
item.description:
Street light is not working from last few days. As a result it’s too dark on street. The faulty street light is outside 52 Norlands crescent, Chislehurst BR7 5RN. Please fix it as soon as possible. Thanks !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 26th March
item.description:
The street light between 52 and 54 Norlands crescent in Chislehurst has stopped working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on grass verge, 26th March
item.description:
Thank you for clearing some of the litter on the grass verge. There is still some nearby the bush/hedge which will be obscured by parked cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of items, 26th March
item.description:
Fly tipping of a clear plastic dining chair, a baby’s play seat and some general cardboard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th March
item.description:
Someone dumped rubbish and please see the uploaded photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Markings Crittall's Corner Roundabout, 26th March
item.description:
The road markings on Crittall's Corner roundabout designed to designate between A20/A223/A224 are beyond faded and practically non existent (particularly the middle line). It is not clear upon entering where one lane ends and the other starts and is highly dangerous. Please repaint.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between bus stand and house at number 2, 26th March
item.description:
Large piece of hardboard
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Graffiti, 26th March
item.description:
Graffiti on wall leading down to the A2 motorway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface very bad on gravel hill/bloomfield road', 26th March
item.description:
Hi, you have advised me that my earlier report regarding to the poor road surface/ pothole at top of Gravel hill just pass Bloomfield road near the bus stop, does not meet the council standard to have the road surface repaired. Can l ask has the traffic management team been to review the road surface, as it’s a short distance from the council office as l don’t understand the reason for not having the surface repaired it’s not is a suitable standard for road users or even cyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rectory Road BR3 streetlight column ID number R7 # 7 not lighting tonight., 26th March
item.description:
Rectory Road BR3 streetlight column ID number R7 # 7 not lighting tonight.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been chutes blocked, 26th March
item.description:
The bin chutes on the block have been blocked for about a month now . Someone came round over 2 weeks ago to try and left if anything it is worse of now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cherry Garden Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Half door fly tipped, 26th March
item.description:
This favourite fly tipping location has been used again today. Yesterday was a broken Forest bike, today a half door. I wonder what the Easter bunny may bring. PS thank you Greenwich council for acting so quickly on the Forest bike which was gone in less than 24 hours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole in speed bump, 26th March
item.description:
This pothole nearly caused me to have an accident,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brim Hill, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tub, 26th March
item.description:
Bath tub

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochford Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No litter, 26th March
item.description:
There is no litter at the bus stop so we constantly have a lot of trash in our garden that is in front of the bus stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandon Furniture obstructing pedestrian pathway, 26th March
item.description:
Abandoned seatee , shopping trolly and other household items blocking obstructing pedestrian walkway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Amunds Close, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead, squashed fox on road, 26th March
item.description:
Dead squashed fox. Spread all over road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, St George's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: No brickwork, 26th March
item.description:
Brick work has been missing so long and no one has replaced it, it is being held up by wood and is horrible to look at. Why do we pay council tax and service charge and they can’t brick it up properly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St James Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches fell, 26th March
item.description:
As a result of the wind, tree branches fell on the ground behind the flats on Greenhaven Drive.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fantail Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
